title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
